title: strychnos borneensis
intro: Strychnos borneensis, also known as the Borneo strychnine tree, is a plant species native to Borneo that belongs to the Loganiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloid compounds, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos borneensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Strychnos borneensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
